thing_1772642937584_e9c6200bce38.name: Masterwork Alchemist's Kit
thing_1772642937584_e9c6200bce38.description: A well-worn leather satchel containing crystal vials, precision scales, a brass mortar and pestle, and several compartments for storing rare ingredients. The inside of the flap bears scorch marks from dozens of minor laboratory mishaps. Type: tool | Slot: waist | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 185 | Weight: 4 | Properties: Allows crafting of potions and alchemical substances; grants advantage on checks to identify unknown liquids or compounds | Bonuses: intelligence +2
thing_1772642937584_e9c6200bce38.shortDescription: Leather satchel with vials, scales, and tools for potion crafting

metadata.properties: Allows crafting of potions and alchemical substances; grants advantage on checks to identify unknown liquids or compounds

thing_1772642937587_5bcb4653ae7b.name: Burnscar's Ring
thing_1772642937587_5bcb4653ae7b.description: A band of blackened iron etched with runic inscriptions that faintly shimmer when exposed to flame. Mirelle forged this ring herself after the accident that scarred her face, as a reminder and a protection against future mishaps. Type: accessory | Slot: ring | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 220 | Weight: 0 | Status Effect: Equipper: Fire Resistance - The wearer gains resistance to fire damage and advantage on saves against effects that would cause burning. | Properties: Grants resistance to fire damage; the ring feels warm to the touch | Bonuses: constitution +2
thing_1772642937587_5bcb4653ae7b.shortDescription: Blackened iron ring providing protection against flames

causeStatusEffectOnEquipper.name: Fire Resistance
causeStatusEffectOnEquipper.description: Flames wash over the bearer with diminished fury, their searing touch reduced to an uncomfortable heat. Magical and mundane fire alike find it harder to take hold on skin or cloth.

causeStatusEffect.name: Fire Resistance
causeStatusEffect.description: Flames wash over the bearer with diminished fury, their searing touch reduced to an uncomfortable heat. Magical and mundane fire alike find it harder to take hold on skin or cloth.

metadata.properties: Grants resistance to fire damage; the ring feels warm to the touch

causeStatusEffectOnEquipper.name: Fire Resistance
causeStatusEffectOnEquipper.description: Flames wash over the bearer with diminished fury, their searing touch reduced to an uncomfortable heat. Magical and mundane fire alike find it harder to take hold on skin or cloth.

thing_1772642937591_78cf6fb31f8c.name: Sturdy Iron Ledger
thing_1772642937591_78cf6fb31f8c.description: A thick-bound book with iron-reinforced covers and pages of treated vellum designed to resist water, mold, and the occasional ale spill. Its contents record every transaction made in the Supply Storeroom for the past three years, along with threatening notes about outstanding debts. Type: tool | Slot: hands | Rarity: Common | Value: 15 | Weight: 3 | Properties: Contains detailed records of all Guildhall supply transactions; pages are waterproof and tear-resistant
thing_1772642937591_78cf6fb31f8c.shortDescription: Waterproof ledger recording supply transactions and debts

metadata.properties: Contains detailed records of all Guildhall supply transactions; pages are waterproof and tear-resistant

thing_1772642937592_6b9ab4c1d919.name: Guild Merchant's Keys
thing_1772642937592_6b9ab4c1d919.description: A heavy iron keyring bearing a dozen keys of varying sizes and complexity, each tagged with a small copper plate identifying which lock it opens. The largest key, blackened with age, fits the iron-bound door to the restricted vault. Type: tool | Rarity: Common | Value: 45 | Weight: 1 | Properties: Opens all standard locks in the Guildhall Supply Storeroom, including the restricted vault; losing these would be catastrophic
thing_1772642937592_6b9ab4c1d919.shortDescription: Iron keyring with keys to storeroom and restricted vault

metadata.properties: Opens all standard locks in the Guildhall Supply Storeroom, including the restricted vault; losing these would be catastrophic

thing_1772642942421_82fef36929c1.name: Guild Master's Signet Ring
thing_1772642942421_82fef36929c1.description: A heavy band of tarnished silver set with a black onyx seal carved with the Adventurer's Guild crest. The ring grants its wearer authority within Dusthollow and can be pressed into hot wax to authorize official guild documents, expedition charters, and bounty contracts. Type: accessory | Slot: ring | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 350 | Weight: 0.1 | Properties: Grants advantage on persuasion checks with guild members; seals documents with unforgeable guild mark | Bonuses: charisma +2, intelligence +2
thing_1772642942421_82fef36929c1.shortDescription: Silver signet ring bearing Guild crest, grants authority and document-sealing power

metadata.properties: Grants advantage on persuasion checks with guild members; seals documents with unforgeable guild mark

thing_1772642942422_dafa2094278d.name: Iron-Bound Ledger of Admissions
thing_1772642942422_dafa2094278d.description: A massive tome with brass-reinforced corners and pages yellowed by age and constant handling. Its columns record every adventurer who has registered with the guild, their last known status, and next of kin—information worth more than gold to those who know how to use it. Type: tool | Slot: hands | Rarity: Common | Value: 25 | Weight: 6 | Properties: Contains records of all guild-registered adventurers; reference checks take 10 minutes
thing_1772642942422_dafa2094278d.shortDescription: Heavy registration tome tracking all guild adventurers and their fates

metadata.properties: Contains records of all guild-registered adventurers; reference checks take 10 minutes

thing_1772642942422_2627e2f1a1fa.name: Silver-Handled Reading Monocle
thing_1772642942422_2627e2f1a1fa.description: An elegant monocle with a silver frame and leather cord, its lens ground from high-quality crystal to precisely correct the wearer's vision. Scrivener uses it to examine the fine print in contracts and detect forgeries by revealing inconsistencies in ink and parchment. Type: tool | Slot: eyewear | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 120 | Weight: 0.1 | Properties: Grants advantage on investigation checks involving written documents; reveals hidden ink and forgeries | Bonuses: wisdom +2
thing_1772642942422_2627e2f1a1fa.shortDescription: Elegant monocle for detecting forgeries and reading fine print

metadata.properties: Grants advantage on investigation checks involving written documents; reveals hidden ink and forgeries

thing_1772642942423_76f3d0868272.name: Bronze Summoning Bell
thing_1772642942423_76f3d0868272.description: A small but heavy bell cast from dark bronze, its clapper wrapped in cloth to prevent accidental ringing. When struck with intention, it produces no audible sound but summons a guild servant through some unseen mechanism—magic or mechanism, none can say. Type: tool | Slot: hands | Rarity: Common | Value: 45 | Weight: 1 | Properties: Silently summons guild servants within the Guildhall; requires attunement to Guild Master position
thing_1772642942423_76f3d0868272.shortDescription: Silent bell that summons servants when struck with intent

metadata.properties: Silently summons guild servants within the Guildhall; requires attunement to Guild Master position

thing_1772642942423_ba18b10e75a6.name: Cabinet of Preserved Specimens
thing_1772642942423_ba18b10e75a6.description: A glass-fronted cabinet mounted on the office wall containing small artifacts recovered from the dungeon—preserved fungal samples, a petrified eye, and a fragment of crystallized magic. These specimens serve as both reference materials and reminders of the labyrinth's dangers. Type: container | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 200 | Weight: 80 | Properties: Contains rare specimens useful for alchemy or dungeon research; cannot be removed from wall
thing_1772642942423_ba18b10e75a6.shortDescription: Mounted display cabinet of preserved dungeon specimens and artifacts

metadata.properties: Contains rare specimens useful for alchemy or dungeon research; cannot be removed from wall

thing_1772642962981_d592aec70330.name: Worn Prayer Beads
thing_1772642962981_d592aec70330.description: A strand of fifty wooden beads carved from sanctified oak, each one smoothed by years of nervous fingers turning them in prayer or desperation. The beads hang from a braided leather cord that has been replaced more times than Osric cares to remember, and faint traces of countless blessings linger in the wood like warmth in sun-baked stone. Type: tool | Slot: accessory | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 25 | Weight: 0.2 | Properties: Grants advantage on prayer and meditation checks; each bead can be used once per day to cast a minor blessing that heals 1d4 hit points | Bonuses: wisdom +2
thing_1772642962981_d592aec70330.shortDescription: Fifty sanctified oak beads on leather cord, worn smooth by years of prayer

metadata.properties: Grants advantage on prayer and meditation checks; each bead can be used once per day to cast a minor blessing that heals 1d4 hit points

thing_1772642962982_050511b6ddd0.name: Iron-Bound Healer's Kit
thing_1772642962982_050511b6ddd0.description: A heavy leather satchel reinforced with iron bands at the corners, containing bandages, needles, thread, a bone saw, tourniquets, and jars of salves and unguents with labels worn to illegibility. The kit smells of dried herbs and iron—the latter from both the bands and the bloodstains that no amount of cleaning has ever fully removed. Type: tool | Slot: hands | Rarity: Common | Value: 15 | Weight: 3 | Properties: Allows stabilization of dying characters and treatment of wounds; contains enough supplies for 10 uses before needing restocking
thing_1772642962982_050511b6ddd0.shortDescription: Leather satchel with medical supplies and tools for treating wounds

metadata.properties: Allows stabilization of dying characters and treatment of wounds; contains enough supplies for 10 uses before needing restocking

thing_1772642962982_5262e903f141.name: Blessed Candle Lantern
thing_1772642962982_5262e903f141.description: A small iron lantern with panels of thick glass, its wick fed by consecrated oil that burns with a steady amber flame regardless of wind or draft. The lantern was a gift from a dying priest who claimed it would never extinguish so long as the bearer's faith held true—a claim Osric has never tested to its limits. Type: tool | Slot: hands | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 35 | Weight: 1.5 | Status Effect: Target: Illuminated - The target is bathed in warm, sacred light that reveals hidden truths and weakens shadow-based creatures. | Properties: Sheds light in a 30-foot radius; undead and shadow creatures make attack rolls at disadvantage within the light; never needs refueling | Bonuses: wisdom +2
thing_1772642962982_5262e903f141.shortDescription: Iron lantern burning consecrated oil with eternal amber flame

causeStatusEffectOnTarget.name: Illuminated
causeStatusEffectOnTarget.description: Sacred radiance clings to the target, casting no shadows and revealing that which prefers darkness. The light burns against creatures of shadow and undead, while clarifying perception and strengthening magical connection.

causeStatusEffect.name: Illuminated
causeStatusEffect.description: Sacred radiance clings to the target, casting no shadows and revealing that which prefers darkness. The light burns against creatures of shadow and undead, while clarifying perception and strengthening magical connection.

metadata.properties: Sheds light in a 30-foot radius; undead and shadow creatures make attack rolls at disadvantage within the light; never needs refueling

causeStatusEffectOnTarget.name: Illuminated
causeStatusEffectOnTarget.description: Sacred radiance clings to the target, casting no shadows and revealing that which prefers darkness. The light burns against creatures of shadow and undead, while clarifying perception and strengthening magical connection.

thing_1772642962987_f64d306bf757.name: Key to the Shrine Cabinet
thing_1772642962987_f64d306bf757.description: A simple iron key worn smooth by use, hanging from a cord around Osric's neck. It opens the locked cabinet behind the dormitory shrine where he stores healing potions, holy water, and emergency supplies—things too precious or dangerous to leave unsecured in a room full of desperate strangers. Type: misc | Slot: neck | Rarity: Common | Value: 5 | Weight: 0.1 | Properties: Opens the shrine cabinet in the Guildhall dormitory; Osric guards it jealously
thing_1772642962987_f64d306bf757.shortDescription: Simple iron key to locked shrine cabinet on cord necklace

metadata.properties: Opens the shrine cabinet in the Guildhall dormitory; Osric guards it jealously

thing_1772643045854_a7751af50858.name: Notice Board
thing_1772643045854_a7751af50858.description: A rain-warped wooden board mounted on iron brackets beside the Guildhall entrance, layered thick with curling parchment notices seeking missing companions, warning of newly discovered hazards, and advertising vacancies in expeditions preparing to descend.
thing_1772643045854_a7751af50858.shortDescription: Rain-warped board layered with expedition notices and warnings

metadata.properties: Contains publicly posted notices about expeditions, bounties, and warnings. Notices can be taken or read.

thing_1772643045855_b25cebbdf477.name: Dented Lantern Post
thing_1772643045855_b25cebbdf477.description: An iron lantern post driven deep into the mud beside the Guildhall porch, its glass panels cracked and clouded with soot from years of burning low-grade oil. The lantern within still burns with a sickly orange flame, maintained by Guild staff to guide returning adventurers through the pre-dawn darkness.
thing_1772643045855_b25cebbdf477.shortDescription: Soot-stained iron post with cracked lantern guiding arrivals

metadata.properties: Provides dim illumination in a 15-foot radius. The lantern oil can be refilled.

thing_1772643045855_a9004580f359.name: Bench of the Fallen
thing_1772643045855_a9004580f359.description: A stone bench worn smooth by countless grieving companions, its surface carved with dozens of names—adventurers who never returned from the depths. Small offerings of coins, dried flowers, and trinkets accumulate in the crevices, left by those who survive to remember.
thing_1772643045855_a9004580f359.shortDescription: Stone memorial bench carved with names of the lost

metadata.properties: Small offerings left by mourners. Those who sit here in quiet contemplation for at least ten minutes feel a subtle sense of peace and resolve.

thing_1772643045855_7dad786e6760.name: Guard Station Awning
thing_1772643045855_7dad786e6760.description: A heavy canvas awning stretched between iron poles, providing shelter for the Guildhall guards from snow and rain. Underneath stands a wooden weapons rack containing practice swords and spears, alongside a brazier of glowing coals that keeps the watch warm during long, cold shifts.
thing_1772643045855_7dad786e6760.shortDescription: Canvas-sheltered guard post with brazier and weapon rack

metadata.properties: Provides shelter from weather. The brazier provides warmth and can be used to light torches or tinderboxes. Practice weapons are available for sparring.

thing_1772643045855_118f6b30862f.name: Mud-Caked Adventurer's Boot
thing_1772643045855_118f6b30862f.description: A single heavy leather boot abandoned in the muck, its sole half-torn and coated in gray dungeon clay that seems to cling with unnatural tenacity. The boot's former owner clearly encountered something unpleasant in the depths—dark stains discolor the leather around a torn strap.
thing_1772643045855_118f6b30862f.shortDescription: Single torn leather boot coated in gray dungeon clay

metadata.properties: Half of a pair. The dungeon clay coating it resists cleaning and leaves gray smudges on everything it touches.

thing_1772643045855_0c365655809d.name: Recovered Token Pouch
thing_1772643045855_0c365655809d.description: A small leather pouch marked with the Guild's lantern crest, used to hold identification tokens of adventurers who died in the labyrinth. This one still contains three tarnished bronze discs, each etched with a name and registration number—unclaimed remains of a failed expedition.
thing_1772643045855_0c365655809d.shortDescription: Pouch containing fallen adventurers' identification tokens

metadata.properties: Contains 3 bronze ID tokens. Guild authorities may reward the return of these tokens to next of kin. The lingering spiritual residue grants occasional premonitions of danger.

thing_1772643045856_c428d8165f09.name: Carved Boundary Stone
thing_1772643045856_c428d8165f09.description: A moss-covered stone marker at the edge of the Guildhall porch, etched with ancient protective runes that have faded to near-invisibility. Legend claims the stones were placed by the first Guild Master to hold the dungeon's influence at bay, though few now believe such superstitions.
thing_1772643045856_c428d8165f09.shortDescription: Mossy runestone with faded protective enchantments

metadata.properties: The faint protective magic reduces the severity of curse effects on those who touch the stone before entering the dungeon. The runes can be examined by those knowledgeable in arcana.

thing_1772643109917_8fff99773b83.name: Pact Dagger
thing_1772643109917_8fff99773b83.description: A ritualistic blade of darkened steel etched with infernal sigils that seem to shift when viewed from the corner of one's eye. The weapon serves as both a focus for Malphis's eldritch invocations and a conduit for his patron's power. Type: weapon | Slot: hands | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 85 | Weight: 1.5 | Properties: Serves as a spellcasting focus; can be used to perform a minor blood ritual to recover a small amount of magical energy once per day | Bonuses: charisma +2
thing_1772643109917_8fff99773b83.shortDescription: Ritual blade etched with shifting infernal sigils

metadata.properties: Serves as a spellcasting focus; can be used to perform a minor blood ritual to recover a small amount of magical energy once per day

thing_1772643109917_750f757b9dff.name: Shadowweave Cloak
thing_1772643109917_750f757b9dff.description: His dark travelling cloak is woven from fabric that seems to drink in the surrounding light, making its wearer difficult to see in dim illumination. Faint shadowy wisps occasionally drift from its hem, remnants of the fell magic used in its creation. Type: armor | Slot: back | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 120 | Weight: 2 | Status Effect: Equipper: Shadow's Embrace - The wearer becomes slightly harder to notice in dim light or darkness, their outline blurring at the edges. | Properties: Advantage on Stealth checks in dim light or darkness | Bonuses: dexterity +2
thing_1772643109917_750f757b9dff.shortDescription: Light-drinking cloak that blurs the wearer's outline

causeStatusEffectOnEquipper.name: Shadow's Embrace
causeStatusEffectOnEquipper.description: The wearer's form bleeds into surrounding darkness, their edges becoming indistinct and difficult to focus upon. In bright light this offers no benefit, but in shadows the effect is disconcerting to observers.

causeStatusEffect.name: Shadow's Embrace
causeStatusEffect.description: The wearer's form bleeds into surrounding darkness, their edges becoming indistinct and difficult to focus upon. In bright light this offers no benefit, but in shadows the effect is disconcerting to observers.

metadata.properties: Advantage on Stealth checks in dim light or darkness

causeStatusEffectOnEquipper.name: Shadow's Embrace
causeStatusEffectOnEquipper.description: The wearer's form bleeds into surrounding darkness, their edges becoming indistinct and difficult to focus upon. In bright light this offers no benefit, but in shadows the effect is disconcerting to observers.

thing_1772643109920_5368b842aaf3.name: Component Pouch
thing_1772643109920_5368b842aaf3.description: A leather satchel containing various arcane materials—obsidian chips, dried newt eyes, small vials of sulfur, and strips of parchment inscribed with corrupted prayers. These components are essential for certain invocations and rituals. Type: tool | Slot: waist | Rarity: Common | Value: 25 | Weight: 2 | Properties: Contains spell components for warlock rituals; must be restocked periodically
thing_1772643109920_5368b842aaf3.shortDescription: Leather satchel of arcane components and ritual materials

metadata.properties: Contains spell components for warlock rituals; must be restocked periodically

thing_1772643109921_7451b686e351.name: Tarnished Bronze Ring
thing_1772643109921_7451b686e351.description: A simple band of aged bronze bearing an inscription in Infernal that glows faintly when its wearer channels magical energy. Malphis received this ring as part of his initial pact, a physical token of the bond between warlock and patron. Type: accessory | Slot: ring | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 65 | Weight: 0.1 | Properties: Glow intensifies when casting warlock spells; allows the wearer to sense the general direction of their patron's influence | Bonuses: wisdom +2
thing_1772643109921_7451b686e351.shortDescription: Pact token that glows when channeling magic

metadata.properties: Glow intensifies when casting warlock spells; allows the wearer to sense the general direction of their patron's influence

thing_1772643111945_2a765f1a6131.name: Wheeldon's Partially Complete Dungeon Atlas
thing_1772643111945_2a765f1a6131.description: A bulging leather map case containing dozens of parchment sheets covered in Tobin's meticulous notation and careful cartography. The maps detail the Faded Halls in impressive detail, but grow increasingly sparse and speculative the deeper they purport to show, with entire sections labeled "rumored" or "conjectural." Type: tool | Slot: hands | Rarity: Common | Value: 25 | Weight: 3
thing_1772643111945_2a765f1a6131.shortDescription: Bulging map case with detailed charts of upper dungeon levels

thing_1772643111945_975754c8f9f9.name: Brass Magnifying Spectacles
thing_1772643111945_975754c8f9f9.description: Thick-lensed brass spectacles with adjustable arms that make Tobin's eyes appear comically large. The lenses are scratched from years of close work, but still serve their purpose of magnifying fine details for cartographic precision. Type: tool | Slot: eyewear | Rarity: Common | Value: 15 | Weight: 0.5 | Bonuses: intelligence +1
thing_1772643111945_975754c8f9f9.shortDescription: Scratched brass lenses that magnify fine details

thing_1772643111946_ae9704707a29.name: Cartographer's Field Kit
thing_1772643111946_ae9704707a29.description: A worn leather satchel containing charcoal sticks, pots of ink in three colors, a bone-handled drafting compass, a metal straightedge, and several stubs of eraser. Everything a dungeon mapper needs to record what they find, assuming they survive long enough to draw it. Type: tool | Rarity: Common | Value: 12 | Weight: 2
thing_1772643111946_ae9704707a29.shortDescription: Worn satchel with ink, charcoal, compass and drafting tools

thing_1772643111946_236e9ea276d5.name: Gnomish Boot-Dagger
thing_1772643111946_236e9ea276d5.description: A small blade barely longer than a human finger, sized for a gnome's grip and worn in a hidden sheath inside Tobin's boot. More useful for cutting parchment or whittling charcoal than actual combat, but better than nothing when giant rats get too curious about his maps. Type: weapon | Rarity: Common | Value: 8 | Weight: 1
thing_1772643111946_236e9ea276d5.shortDescription: Tiny hidden blade for last-resort defense and utility

thing_1772643111946_ecdb793ec0f5.name: Lucky Moth-Eaten Scarf
thing_1772643111946_ecdb793ec0f5.description: A faded wool scarf in what was once forest green, now more of a sickly sage after years of dungeon dampness. Tobin insists it's brought him through every expedition safely, though given he's never ventured past the Faded Halls, that's not saying much. Type: armor | Slot: neck | Rarity: Junk | Value: 2 | Weight: 0.5 | Bonuses: constitution -1
thing_1772643111946_ecdb793ec0f5.shortDescription: Faded damp wool scarf of questionable protective value

thing_1772643143522_b0656d57b5c4.name: Worn Iron Longsword
thing_1772643143522_b0656d57b5c4.description: A reliable blade bearing the marks of honest use, its edge recently honed by a Guild weaponsmith. The leather-wrapped grip has been stained dark by sweat and blood from countless drills. Type: weapon | Slot: hands | Rarity: Common | Value: 15 | Weight: 3 | Properties: A standard weapon for those who rely on strength and reach in combat. | Bonuses: strength +1, dexterity -1
thing_1772643143522_b0656d57b5c4.shortDescription: A reliable used blade with a recently honed edge and worn leather grip.

metadata.properties: A standard weapon for those who rely on strength and reach in combat.

thing_1772643143522_398a77ec522c.name: Padded Leather Armor
thing_1772643143522_398a77ec522c.description: Layers of boiled leather reinforced with quilted cloth at the joints, offering protection without sacrificing mobility. The straps show wear but remain functional. Type: armor | Slot: body | Rarity: Common | Value: 20 | Weight: 10 | Properties: Provides basic protection against physical attacks.
thing_1772643143522_398a77ec522c.shortDescription: Boiled leather layers with quilted cloth reinforcement at the joints.

metadata.properties: Provides basic protection against physical attacks.

thing_1772643143524_414c3a84438a.name: Traveler's Rations
thing_1772643143524_414c3a84438a.description: A wrapped bundle containing dried meat, hard biscuits, and a wedge of wax-sealed cheese. Enough sustenance for three days of delving. Type: consumable | Rarity: Common | Value: 3 | Weight: 2 | Properties: Contains 3 days of food. Essential for extended expeditions.
thing_1772643143524_414c3a84438a.shortDescription: Dried meat, hard biscuits, and wax-sealed cheese for three days.

metadata.properties: Contains 3 days of food. Essential for extended expeditions.

thing_1772643663799_9b9c05058aac.name: Master Faldrin's Incomplete Survey Charts
thing_1772643663799_9b9c05058aac.description: A bundle of yellowed vellum sheets covered in precise cartographic notation, detailing roughly two-thirds of the Faded Halls before the ink trails off into frantic scribbles. Several passages are marked with warning symbols and question marks, and the final sheet contains a half-finished sketch of something called "the Breathing Stair." Type: tool | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 75 | Weight: 1 | Properties: Grants advantage on navigation checks within the Faded Halls; contains clues to hidden passages and secret doors | Bonuses: wisdom +2
thing_1772643663799_9b9c05058aac.shortDescription: Half-finished dungeon maps with warning notations

metadata.properties: Grants advantage on navigation checks within the Faded Halls; contains clues to hidden passages and secret doors

thing_1772643663800_8b13e5214b04.name: Brass-Bound Map Case
thing_1772643663800_8b13e5214b04.description: A cylindrical case of treated leather reinforced with brass fittings at both ends, designed to keep precious documents safe from water, mold, and the dungeon's hostile environment. The clasp sticks slightly, requiring a practiced touch to open quickly. Type: container | Slot: waist | Rarity: Common | Value: 15 | Weight: 2 | Properties: Waterproof; protects documents from environmental damage
thing_1772643663800_8b13e5214b04.shortDescription: Waterproof document container with brass fittings

metadata.properties: Waterproof; protects documents from environmental damage

thing_1772643663800_0b2724f4205c.name: Cartographer's Field Instruments
thing_1772643663800_0b2724f4205c.description: A leather roll containing a brass compass, calibrated measuring cord, drafting pens, bottles of waterproof ink in three colors, and a small slate board for field notes. Each tool shows signs of frequent use but has been meticulously maintained. Type: tool | Slot: hands | Rarity: Common | Value: 25 | Weight: 3 | Properties: Required for creating accurate maps; can measure distances and angles in dungeon environments | Bonuses: intelligence +1
thing_1772643663800_0b2724f4205c.shortDescription: Mapping tools with compass, pens, and measuring cord

metadata.properties: Required for creating accurate maps; can measure distances and angles in dungeon environments

thing_1772643663801_a86afcb5d329.name: Thick Magnifying Spectacles
thing_1772643663801_a86afcb5d329.description: Clouded lenses in wire frames that magnify the wearer's eyes to comical proportions, making their pale grey irises appear enormous. The magnification is powerful enough to read faded manuscript text or examine fine details in stonework. Type: tool | Slot: eyewear | Rarity: Common | Value: 12 | Weight: 0.25 | Properties: Grants bonus to perception checks involving fine detail; slightly impairs distant vision while worn | Bonuses: wisdom +1, charisma -1
thing_1772643663801_a86afcb5d329.shortDescription: Powerful magnifying lenses for examining fine details

metadata.properties: Grants bonus to perception checks involving fine detail; slightly impairs distant vision while worn

thing_1772643663801_b638fdc40515.name: Stubby Iron-Shod Staff
thing_1772643663801_b638fdc40515.description: A walking staff cut short for a small frame, its base banded with iron to grip uneven stone. The wood is worn smooth from years of nervous handling, and small notches are carved near the grip—tally marks counting something the owner prefers not to discuss. Type: weapon | Slot: hands | Rarity: Common | Value: 8 | Weight: 3 | Properties: Functions as a walking stick; iron tip useful for probing unstable ground or striking
thing_1772643663801_b638fdc40515.shortDescription: Short walking staff with iron tip

metadata.properties: Functions as a walking stick; iron tip useful for probing unstable ground or striking

thing_1772643733194_1be220f5e6fb.name: Vornath's Survivor Ledger
thing_1772643733194_1be220f5e6fb.description: A leather-bound journal filled with cramped, meticulous handwriting documenting departure times, party compositions, and return statistics. Certain entries are circled in red ink, marking routes or team configurations that resulted in zero survivors. Type: tool | Slot: hands | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 75 | Weight: 2 | Properties: Grants advantage on checks to identify safe routes through the dungeon when consulted. Contains compiled survival data that Vornath trades selectively. | Bonuses: wisdom +2, intelligence +2
thing_1772643733194_1be220f5e6fb.shortDescription: Leather journal tracking dungeon survival patterns and deadly routes

metadata.properties: Grants advantage on checks to identify safe routes through the dungeon when consulted. Contains compiled survival data that Vornath trades selectively.

thing_1772643733194_f3a837fe9687.name: Vornath's Duty Crossbow
thing_1772643733194_f3a837fe9687.description: A sturdy, well-maintained crossbow with reinforced arms and a hair-trigger mechanism. The stock bears dozens of tally marks scratched into the wood—a grim count of warnings issued to those who threatened the checkpoint's fragile peace. Type: weapon | Slot: hands | Rarity: Common | Value: 45 | Weight: 6 | Properties: Reliable and easy to maintain. Vornath keeps it loaded but uncocked at all times. | Bonuses: dexterity +2
thing_1772643733194_f3a837fe9687.shortDescription: Sturdy crossbow marked with tallies of warnings issued

metadata.properties: Reliable and easy to maintain. Vornath keeps it loaded but uncocked at all times.

thing_1772643733194_e6e72b969785.name: Stained Guild Tabard
thing_1772643733194_e6e72b969785.description: A once-crimson tabard now faded to dull rust, embroidered with the Adventurer's Guild crest over chainmail. Old stains from blood, mud, and cheaper ale have proven impossible to remove, giving the garment a lived-in appearance. Type: armor | Slot: body | Rarity: Common | Value: 20 | Weight: 4 | Properties: Identifies wearer as Guild-affiliated. Provides basic protection and authority at official checkpoints.
thing_1772643733194_e6e72b969785.shortDescription: Faded Guild tabard worn over chainmail with old stains

metadata.properties: Identifies wearer as Guild-affiliated. Provides basic protection and authority at official checkpoints.

thing_1772643733195_67a3238e766b.name: Chained Registration Ledger
thing_1772643733195_67a3238e766b.description: A massive tome secured to the checkpoint desk by a heavy iron chain, its pages yellowed and water-damaged from years of exposure to the dungeon's exhaled mist. Adventurers are required to log their names, intended routes, and expected return dates—entries that go largely unread. Type: tool | Rarity: Junk | Value: 5 | Weight: 15 | Properties: Required registration point for dungeon expeditions. Too heavy and well-secured to be easily stolen.
thing_1772643733195_67a3238e766b.shortDescription: Heavy chained ledger for expedition registration

metadata.properties: Required registration point for dungeon expeditions. Too heavy and well-secured to be easily stolen.

thing_1772643738593_1692727cd4b9.name: Twilight Mold Phial
thing_1772643738593_1692727cd4b9.description: A thumb-sized glass Twilight Mold Phial containing a small colony of luminescent mold harvested from the Twilight Depths, its soft blue-green glow pulses faintly through the cork stopper. When exposed to air and moisture, the spores rapidly colonize organic surfaces, making them valuable for marking paths or creating distractions in the dungeon's darkness. Type: consumable | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 45 | Weight: 0.1 | Status Effect: Target: Glowing Trail - The target area becomes faintly luminescent, leaving a visible trail that persists for hours and marks the path for others to follow. | Properties: Can be used to mark paths in darkness; slowly replenishes its spores if kept in a damp, dark environment
thing_1772643738593_1692727cd4b9.shortDescription: Bioluminescent fungus spores in a sealed vial

causeStatusEffectOnTarget.name: Glowing Trail
causeStatusEffectOnTarget.description: A phosphorescent trail marks the passage of those affected, shedding faint light and making stealth nearly impossible while illuminating the path ahead.

causeStatusEffect.name: Glowing Trail
causeStatusEffect.description: A phosphorescent trail marks the passage of those affected, shedding faint light and making stealth nearly impossible while illuminating the path ahead.

causeStatusEffectOnTarget.description: A phosphorescent trail marks the passage of those affected, shedding faint light and making stealth nearly impossible while illuminating the path ahead.

thing_1772643738600_a7c02adba660.name: Sporekeeper's Gloves
thing_1772643738600_a7c02adba660.description: Thin leather gloves stained with faded streaks of blue and green, their fingertips reinforced with treated silk that allows precise handling of delicate fungal specimens without contamination. The palm contains a hidden pocket designed to hold a single dose of powdered reagent for quick application. Type: armor | Slot: gloves | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 120 | Weight: 0.5 | Properties: Hidden palm pocket holds one dose of powdered reagent; provides resistance to contact poisons and irritating spores | Bonuses: dexterity +2, intelligence +2
thing_1772643738600_a7c02adba660.shortDescription: Alchemist's leather gloves with hidden reagent pocket

metadata.properties: Hidden palm pocket holds one dose of powdered reagent; provides resistance to contact poisons and irritating spores

thing_1772643738600_7e12a195cca1.name: Draught of Clear Lungs
thing_1772643738600_7e12a195cca1.description: A bitter-tasting liquid in a ceramic flask, this remedy coats the throat and lungs with a protective film that neutralizes inhaled toxins and spores before they can take hold. Ithelwen brews fresh batches weekly, though she keeps a few older vials set aside for customers she suspects won't return. Type: consumable | Rarity: Common | Value: 25 | Weight: 0.3 | Status Effect: Equipper: Spore Resistance - Grants temporary immunity to inhaled poisons, spores, and noxious gases for the duration. | Properties: Duration: 1 hour; stale batches have reduced effectiveness but are sold at full price to the unwary
thing_1772643738600_7e12a195cca1.shortDescription: Protects against inhaled toxins and dungeon spores

causeStatusEffectOnEquipper.name: Spore Resistance
causeStatusEffectOnEquipper.description: A protective barrier coats the lungs and throat, rendering breathing safe even in the most toxic fungal chambers or gas-filled corridors of the Twilight Depths.

causeStatusEffect.name: Spore Resistance
causeStatusEffect.description: A protective barrier coats the lungs and throat, rendering breathing safe even in the most toxic fungal chambers or gas-filled corridors of the Twilight Depths.

metadata.properties: Duration: 1 hour; stale batches have reduced effectiveness but are sold at full price to the unwary

causeStatusEffectOnEquipper.name: Spore Resistance
causeStatusEffectOnEquipper.description: A protective barrier coats the lungs and throat, rendering breathing safe even in the most toxic fungal chambers or gas-filled corridors of the Twilight Depths.

thing_1772643738606_ac0721505c2e.name: Preserved Corpsecap Mushroom
thing_1772643738606_ac0721505c2e.description: A squat, dun-colored mushroom suspended in amber liquid within a rounded glass jar, harvested from the decaying matter of undead creatures in the lower strata. The specimen is carefully preserved for alchemical use, retaining its unique properties that allow it to absorb and neutralize small amounts of necrotic energy. Type: reagent | Rarity: Rare | Value: 180 | Weight: 1 | Properties: Essential component for potions of necrotic resistance; a single specimen yields 2-3 doses when properly processed | Bonuses: wisdom +3
thing_1772643738606_ac0721505c2e.shortDescription: Rare mushroom for necrotic resistance potions

metadata.properties: Essential component for potions of necrotic resistance; a single specimen yields 2-3 doses when properly processed

thing_1772643830403_a47de85fb422.name: Chalk Marked Warning Stone
thing_1772643830403_a47de85fb422.description: A river-smooth stone painted with crude chalk markings—a skull and arrow pointing downward—left by a previous adventuring party to warn others of a trap or danger they encountered in the Faded Halls.
thing_1772643830403_a47de85fb422.shortDescription: River stone with chalk skull marking warning of danger

metadata.properties: Can be left as a marker for others to find; may contain useful information about dungeon hazards

thing_1772643830403_1e09fd8e7e50.name: Dried Mushroom Jerky Strip
thing_1772643830403_1e09fd8e7e50.description: A tough, leathery strip of salted dungeon mushroom sold by a vendor who insists it's "better than it smells." The chewy provision provides surprisingly decent sustenance for those who can stomach its earthy, slightly bitter taste.
thing_1772643830403_1e09fd8e7e50.shortDescription: Chewy salted mushroom strip for dungeon sustenance

metadata.properties: Restores minor stamina; lasts longer than fresh provisions without spoiling

thing_1772643830403_b54fa13431fa.name: Cracked Memorial Stele
thing_1772643830403_b54fa13431fa.description: A weathered stone slab set into the retaining wall, its surface covered with dozens of carved names—adventurers who entered the labyrinth and never returned. Fresh chalk X's mark those recently confirmed dead, while faded names slowly erode into illegibility.
thing_1772643830403_b54fa13431fa.shortDescription: Stone memorial wall carved with names of lost adventurers

metadata.properties: Can be examined to learn the names of fallen adventurers; locals sometimes leave coins or flowers at its base

thing_1772643830404_a6db85798c29.name: Merchant's Collapsible Stall Frame
thing_1772643830404_a6db85798c29.description: A cleverly jointed wooden framework that unfolds into a serviceable market stall, its canvas awning faded but still functional. The merchant who owns it has carved protective sigils into the legs—superstition, perhaps, but the stall has survived three seasons at the dungeon's mouth.
thing_1772643830404_a6db85798c29.shortDescription: Jointed wooden stall frame with protective carved sigils

metadata.properties: Provides shelter from weather; the protective sigils may offer minor resistance against dungeon-born miasmas

thing_1772643830404_bcfa51c1d5e1.name: Despairing Beggar's Shrine
thing_1772643830404_bcfa51c1d5e1.description: A small niche hollowed into the crumbling brick wall, filled with melted candle stubs, faded silk ribbons, and a crude clay figurine representing some saint of lost causes. The hollow-eyed woman maintains it meticulously, though her prayers seem to go unanswered.
thing_1772643830404_bcfa51c1d5e1.shortDescription: Niche shrine with candles and figurine for lost causes

metadata.properties: Can be harvested for candle stubs or ribbons; leaving an offering may grant a minor blessing or information from the woman

thing_1772643949100_f7aaa7bd81e3.name: Notched Iron Longsword
thing_1772643949100_f7aaa7bd81e3.description: A serviceable blade recovered from the Faded Halls, its edge marred by goblin teeth marks and what looks uncomfortably like old bloodstains that never quite scrubbed out. Holt insists the notches give it "character" and has priced it accordingly. Type: weapon | Slot: hands | Rarity: Common | Value: 35 | Weight: 3 | Properties: Bloodstained: Previous owner met a violent end
thing_1772643949100_f7aaa7bd81e3.shortDescription: Worn blade with mysterious stains and notched edge

metadata.properties: Bloodstained: Previous owner met a violent end

thing_1772643949100_0d7f8e56a243.name: Reinforced Leather Gambeson
thing_1772643949100_0d7f8e56a243.description: A quilted defense of boiled leather and padded cloth, stitched with iron rings at the vital points. The previous owner's initials are clumsily crossed out on the collar, and a lucky rabbit's foot still dangles from one shoulder strap. Type: armor | Slot: body | Rarity: Common | Value: 65 | Weight: 8 | Properties: Lucky charm attached, previous owner's marks crossed out
thing_1772643949100_0d7f8e56a243.shortDescription: Padded leather armor with iron ring reinforcement

metadata.properties: Lucky charm attached, previous owner's marks crossed out

thing_1772643949100_cc2a8094efe5.name: Merchant's Assessment Ledger
thing_1772643949100_cc2a8094efe5.description: A water-stained book filled with Holt's cramped handwriting documenting purchase prices, sale prices, and terse notes like "didn't ask" and "sold as-is." The back pages contain a running tally of debts owed by various adventurers—several names have been crossed out with finality. Type: tool | Rarity: Common | Value: 5 | Weight: 1 | Properties: Contains records of transactions and debts
thing_1772643949100_cc2a8094efe5.shortDescription: Water-damaged ledger tracking prices and debts

metadata.properties: Contains records of transactions and debts

thing_1772643949101_ae68998890ca.name: Portable Grinding Wheel
thing_1772643949101_ae68998890ca.description: A compact sharpening stone mounted on a folding wooden frame with a foot pedal mechanism. Holt uses this to touch up blades between sales, though the stone itself is worn concave from years of restoring edges to weapons that have seen better days. Type: tool | Rarity: Common | Value: 40 | Weight: 25 | Properties: Can sharpen and maintain bladed weapons
thing_1772643949101_ae68998890ca.shortDescription: Folding sharpening stone for blade maintenance

metadata.properties: Can sharpen and maintain bladed weapons

thing_1772643955561_e30c9fcf5ff3.name: Brunhilda's Seasoned Iron Pot
thing_1772643955561_e30c9fcf5ff3.description: A heavy cast-iron cooking pot blackened by decades of cook-fires, its interior seasoned to a mirror sheen. The enchanted iron distributes heat perfectly, ensuring nothing burns—even when its owner gets to telling one of her stories. Type: tool | Slot: hands | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 45 | Weight: 12 | Properties: Never burns food; keeps meals warm for 6 hours | Bonuses: constitution +2
thing_1772643955561_e30c9fcf5ff3.shortDescription: Well-seasoned iron cooking pot, never burns food

metadata.properties: Never burns food; keeps meals warm for 6 hours

thing_1772643955562_5ac206a60433.name: Stirring Spoon of the Deepdelver Clan
thing_1772643955562_5ac206a60433.description: A worn wooden spoon carved from underground ironwood, its handle etched with dwarven runes marking generations of use. The runes glow faintly when the spoon detects poison or spoilage in food—a practical safeguard from a practical people. Type: tool | Slot: hands | Rarity: Common | Value: 15 | Weight: 1 | Properties: Glowing runes detect poison or spoiled food
thing_1772643955562_5ac206a60433.shortDescription: Runed wooden spoon that detects poison and spoilage

metadata.properties: Glowing runes detect poison or spoiled food

thing_1772643955562_fd2f98829c62.name: Delver's Luck Pendant
thing_1772643955562_fd2f98829c62.description: A tarnished brass locket containing a tiny portrait of a dwarf with kind eyes and a braided beard. It smells faintly of pipe smoke and something unmentionable—a keepsake from Brunhilda's delving days, worn smooth by nervous fingers. Type: accessory | Slot: neck | Rarity: Common | Value: 20 | Weight: 0 | Properties: Once per day, wearer may reroll a single saving throw | Bonuses: wisdom +2
thing_1772643955562_fd2f98829c62.shortDescription: Sentimental brass locket, grants luck in danger

metadata.properties: Once per day, wearer may reroll a single saving throw

thing_1772643955563_ff3226ef06d8.name: Field Kitchen Workstation
thing_1772643955563_ff3226ef06d8.description: A collapsible wooden frame fitted with hooks for pots, a built-in cutting board, and drawers for spices and utensils. Brunhilda can set it up or break it down in minutes, though the years have added a few extra creaks to its joints. Type: furniture | Rarity: Common | Value: 35 | Weight: 45 | Properties: Collapsible; provides bonuses to cooking-related checks
thing_1772643955563_ff3226ef06d8.shortDescription: Collapsible outdoor kitchen with hooks and drawers

metadata.properties: Collapsible; provides bonuses to cooking-related checks

thing_1772643964868_600dc07cceab.name: Iron-knuckled Enforcer's Gauntlets
thing_1772643964868_600dc07cceab.description: These heavy leather gauntlets are reinforced with iron plates across the knuckles and palms, designed for delivering bone-cracking blows while protecting the wearer's hands. Scuff marks and dried blood testify to their frequent use in pacifying unruly patrons. Type: armor | Slot: gloves | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 85 | Weight: 3 | Status Effect: Target: Dazed - A concussive blow leaves the target momentarily disoriented, causing them to stumble and struggle to focus their thoughts or coordinate their movements. | Properties: Increases unarmed damage; provides minor protection when parrying | Bonuses: strength +2, dexterity -2
thing_1772643964868_600dc07cceab.shortDescription: Reinforced leather gauntlets with iron knuckles for subduing troublemakers

causeStatusEffectOnTarget.name: Dazed
causeStatusEffectOnTarget.description: Ears ring and vision swims after a powerful impact. Thoughts come slowly and limbs feel disconnected, making precise actions difficult and reactions sluggish.

causeStatusEffect.name: Dazed
causeStatusEffect.description: Ears ring and vision swims after a powerful impact. Thoughts come slowly and limbs feel disconnected, making precise actions difficult and reactions sluggish.
