thing_1772643964879_7f40bfc66dd0.name: Market Bouncer's Badge
thing_1772643964879_7f40bfc66dd0.description: A tarnished bronze medallion stamped with the crossed sword and coin symbol of the Dusthollow Merchant Consortium, identifying the bearer as an authorized enforcer. The back bears Magra's name etched in crude but legible script, along with a sequential number indicating she was the seventh to receive this designation. Type: accessory | Slot: neck | Rarity: Common | Value: 15 | Weight: 0.25 | Properties: Grants authority to remove troublemakers from market premises; recognized by Dusthollow merchants and Guild representatives
thing_1772643964879_7f40bfc66dd0.shortDescription: Bronze medallion identifying an authorized market enforcer

metadata.properties: Grants authority to remove troublemakers from market premises; recognized by Dusthollow merchants and Guild representatives

thing_1772643964879_a5d3694b4e23.name: Healing Potion, Standard Issue
thing_1772643964879_a5d3694b4e23.description: A palm-sized glass vial containing a viscous crimson liquid that glimmers faintly when agitated, stoppered with wax-sealed cork. These mass-produced restoratives are purchased in bulk by the Merchant Consortium for their enforcers—potent enough to knit minor wounds but too diluted for serious injuries. Type: consumable | Rarity: Common | Value: 45 | Weight: 0.5 | Properties: Restores moderate health when consumed; single use
thing_1772643964879_a5d3694b4e23.shortDescription: Standard healing potion for treating minor to moderate wounds

metadata.properties: Restores moderate health when consumed; single use

thing_1772643964879_6e99ce8d5afe.name: Thick Canvas Belt with Pouches
thing_1772643964879_6e99ce8d5afe.description: A sturdy reinforced belt worn low on the hips, fitted with a weathered iron buckle and four small pouches containing odds and ends—twine, a few copper coins, a stub of pencil, and dried meat strips. The leather has darkened from sweat and age but remains supple and reliable. Type: armor | Slot: waist | Rarity: Common | Value: 12 | Weight: 1.5 | Properties: Provides minor storage capacity; pouches contain small miscellaneous items
thing_1772643964879_6e99ce8d5afe.shortDescription: Practical belt with pouches carrying everyday necessities

metadata.properties: Provides minor storage capacity; pouches contain small miscellaneous items

thing_1772643981054_fc0cabf4c98f.name: Rumor Ledger
thing_1772643981054_fc0cabf4c98f.description: A dog-eared leather notebook bursting with cramped handwriting, crossed-out entries, and ink stains of varying colors. Pages are tabbed with scraps of cloth, dried leaves, and one suspiciously human-looking fingernail bone, each marking a different category of intelligence gathered from taverns and waystations throughout Dusthollow. Type: tool | Slot: hands | Rarity: Common | Value: 15 | Weight: 1 | Bonuses: intelligence +1
thing_1772643981054_fc0cabf4c98f.shortDescription: Crumpled notebook crammed with gossip and intelligence

thing_1772643981054_41b442cd2a4c.name: Bartered Truth Amulet
thing_1772643981054_41b442cd2a4c.description: A tarnished silver pendant containing a tiny mirror on one side and a hidden compartment on the other, just large enough for a pinch of powder or a folded note. Runes etched along its edge allow the wearer to perfectly recall any conversation from the past day. Type: accessory | Slot: neck | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 85 | Weight: 0 | Status Effect: Equipper: Perfect Recall - The wearer can flawlessly remember any conversation heard while the Bartered Truth Amulet is worn. | Bonuses: charisma +2, wisdom +2
thing_1772643981054_41b442cd2a4c.shortDescription: Silver locket granting perfect conversational memory

causeStatusEffectOnEquipper.name: Perfect Recall
causeStatusEffectOnEquipper.description: Memories of overheard conversations crystalize with unnatural clarity, allowing the wearer to recall every word, tone, and subtle inflection days later as if hearing them anew.

causeStatusEffect.name: Perfect Recall
causeStatusEffect.description: Memories of overheard conversations crystalize with unnatural clarity, allowing the wearer to recall every word, tone, and subtle inflection days later as if hearing them anew.

causeStatusEffectOnEquipper.name: Perfect Recall
causeStatusEffectOnEquipper.description: Memories of overheard conversations crystalize with unnatural clarity, allowing the wearer to recall every word, tone, and subtle inflection days later as if hearing them anew.

thing_1772643981065_96b87aa1a49a.name: Too-Many Pouch Belt
thing_1772643981065_96b87aa1a49a.description: A worn leather belt hung with no fewer than fourteen pouches of varying sizes, some tied shut with colored string to indicate contents. The belt creaks and jingles with each movement, though the pouches seem to redistribute their weight in oddly helpful ways. Type: armor | Slot: waist | Rarity: Common | Value: 25 | Weight: 3 | Properties: Contains 14 small pouches for storing odds and ends | Bonuses: dexterity -1, constitution +1
thing_1772643981065_96b87aa1a49a.shortDescription: Leather belt with fourteen pouches, slightly cumbersome

metadata.properties: Contains 14 small pouches for storing odds and ends

thing_1772643981065_9f1fccf72150.name: Conspirator's Bent Coin
thing_1772643981065_9f1fccf72150.description: A bent copper coin stamped with a forgotten lord's face, worn smooth on one side from nervous thumb-rubbing. Gnomish enchantment allows two such coins to transmit faint murmurs across the span of a large tavern or marketplace—useful for coordinating informants or warning of approaching trouble. Type: tool | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 60 | Weight: 0 | Properties: Paired coins transmit faint murmurs over short distances | Bonuses: charisma +2
thing_1772643981065_9f1fccf72150.shortDescription: Bent coin transmitting whispers between paired pieces

metadata.properties: Paired coins transmit faint whispers over short distances

thing_1772644209453_84091bc75880.name: Ribbon of Quiet Promises
thing_1772644209453_84091bc75880.description: A pale silk ribbon once tied around a memorial stone, now weathered to a ghostly gray. Adventurers sometimes tie these to stones before descending, a small promise to return for them.
thing_1772644209453_84091bc75880.shortDescription: Weathered silk ribbon tied to memorial stones by hopeful adventurers

metadata.properties: Often found blowing against memorial stones; considered a good omen by some, bad luck by others

thing_1772644209454_584906296714.name: Last Word Chit
thing_1772644209454_584906296714.description: A small copper coin engraved with a single word on each side—"Return" and "Remember." Adventurers press these into the hands of those who stay behind, a compact to speak for them if they never return.
thing_1772644209454_584906296714.shortDescription: Copper coin engraved with promises, steadying nerves against fear

metadata.properties: Grants advantage on saves against fear when worn; some say the coin grows warm when death approaches

thing_1772644209454_47f4514e3f6b.name: Shattered Veteran's Staff
thing_1772644209454_47f4514e3f6b.description: The splintered remains of a quarterstaff lies half-buried in the rocky soil, its wood gray and cracked from years of exposure. One end still bears a corroded iron cap, the other a dark stain that might be old blood or simply age.
thing_1772644209454_47f4514e3f6b.shortDescription: Splintered quarterstaff remains, weathered and stained

metadata.properties: Can be salvaged for firewood or crude wooden chunks; a melancholy reminder of someone who fell

thing_1772644209454_203c3c6be583.name: Weeping Memorial Stone
thing_1772644209454_203c3c6be583.description: A massive slab of dark granite carved with dozens of names, its surface perpetually damp with moisture that seeps from within the stone itself. The water collects in a natural basin at its base, clear and faintly luminescent, and locals claim it reflects not the viewer's face but their true self.
thing_1772644209454_203c3c6be583.shortDescription: Massive granite monument that weeps luminescent water of self-reflection

metadata.properties: The water can be collected as Phial of Weeping Water (consumable, grants brief insight into one's own fate); replenishes at midnight; looking into the basin for too long causes melancholy

thing_1772644209454_206b96edf12c.name: Wind-Carved Warning Post
thing_1772644209454_206b96edf12c.description: A weathered wooden post driven into the rocky ground, its surface dense with carved warnings in multiple languages—some barely legible, others freshly cut. Bits of cloth, bone fragments, and small tokens hang from nails driven into its sides, offerings from survivors or desperate pleas from those about to descend.
thing_1772644209454_206b96edf12c.shortDescription: Warning post covered in carved messages and survivor offerings

metadata.properties: Reading the warnings grants a small bonus to perception of dungeon hazards; sometimes contains clues about recent dangers; the offerings can occasionally be taken (minor trinkets)

thing_1772644245918_6047975fa461.name: Notched Greataxe of the Deep Delver
thing_1772644245918_6047975fa461.description: This massive two-handed axe has been reforged from deeper dungeon steel, its edge nicked from countless battles against chitin-hard shells and animated bones. The half-orc runes etched along the haft glow faintly when danger approaches—a practical enchantment paid for with a month's worth of abyssal pearls. Type: weapon | Slot: hands | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 385 | Weight: 12 | Status Effect: Target: Bleeding Wound - A deep wound that continues to bleed, causing ongoing damage until properly treated. | Properties: Critical hits cause target to bleed for additional damage over time. Glows faintly blue when creatures from the Abyssal Reaches or lower are within 60 feet. | Bonuses: strength +4, constitution +2
thing_1772644245918_6047975fa461.shortDescription: Massive battle-scarred two-handed axe that glows near deep dungeon threats

causeStatusEffectOnTarget.name: Bleeding Wound
causeStatusEffectOnTarget.description: Arterial blood flows freely from a deep gash, weakening the body with each passing moment. The wound requires immediate medical attention or the application of pressure to stem the crimson tide.

causeStatusEffect.name: Bleeding Wound
causeStatusEffect.description: Arterial blood flows freely from a deep gash, weakening the body with each passing moment. The wound requires immediate medical attention or the application of pressure to stem the crimson tide.

metadata.properties: Critical hits cause target to bleed for additional damage over time. Glows faintly blue when creatures from the Abyssal Reaches or lower are within 60 feet.

causeStatusEffectOnTarget.name: Bleeding Wound
causeStatusEffectOnTarget.description: Arterial blood flows freely from a deep gash, weakening the body with each passing moment. The wound requires immediate medical attention or the application of pressure to stem the crimson tide.

thing_1772644245928_81100c352c3d.name: Chainmail of the Unreturned
thing_1772644245928_81100c352c3d.description: Once fine chainmail now shows rust spots and permanent bloodstains that no amount of cleaning will remove. Four small memorial pins are woven into the left shoulder—tokens from companions who died wearing similar armor in the depths below. Type: armor | Slot: body | Rarity: Common | Value: 75 | Weight: 40 | Properties: Provides reliable protection but the rusted links occasionally catch at inopportune moments, slightly reducing agility. | Bonuses: constitution +2, dexterity -2
thing_1772644245928_81100c352c3d.shortDescription: Rust-spotted chainmail armor with memorial pins woven into shoulder

metadata.properties: Provides reliable protection but the rusted links occasionally catch at inopportune moments, slightly reducing agility.

thing_1772644245928_d3409dcd1b83.name: Mourner's Cloak
thing_1772644245928_d3409dcd1b83.description: A heavy wool cloak the color of dried blood, its hood lined with fur from a creature that dwells in the Twilight Depths. The fabric has been treated with simple warding magic that offers marginal protection against the dungeon's supernatural cold. Type: armor | Slot: back | Rarity: Common | Value: 45 | Weight: 4 | Properties: Provides resistance to environmental cold and dampness common in the dungeon's upper levels. | Bonuses: wisdom +2
thing_1772644245928_d3409dcd1b83.shortDescription: Heavy blood-colored cloak with warded lining against dungeon cold

metadata.properties: Provides resistance to environmental cold and dampness common in the dungeon's upper levels.

thing_1772644245928_b1b3ba07c525.name: Twilight Fungus Rations
thing_1772644245928_b1b3ba07c525.description: Dried strips of bioluminescent fungus from the second stratum, packed in waxed cloth to preserve their faint nutritional value. Though bitter and vaguely metallic in taste, they provide sustenance and their faint glow can serve as emergency light. Type: consumable | Rarity: Common | Value: 8 | Weight: 0.5 | Properties: Provides one day's worth of rations. Glows dimly for 10 feet of illumination for 1 hour if removed from packaging.
thing_1772644245928_b1b3ba07c525.shortDescription: Dried bioluminescent fungus strips that glow as emergency light

metadata.properties: Provides one day's worth of rations. Glows dimly for 10 feet of illumination for 1 hour if removed from packaging.

thing_1772644493223_e3c9542796ec.name: Corroded Iron Spike of the Fallen
thing_1772644493223_e3c9542796ec.description: A corroded iron spike recovered from some poor soul's gear, bent at an angle that suggests it was driven into something—or someone—with tremendous force. The metal has taken on a sickly greenish patina from prolonged exposure to the dungeon's breath.
thing_1772644493223_e3c9542796ec.shortDescription: A corroded, bent iron spike with a sickly greenish patina from dungeon exposure.

metadata.properties: Salvageable into scrap iron. Serves as grim proof of the dungeon's dangers.

thing_1772644493224_dbcc77c8b0e2.name: Guidepost Scout's Monocle
thing_1772644493224_dbcc77c8b0e2.description: A brass-rimmed monocle with a hairline crack running through the lens, formerly property of a Guild scout who made a living guiding parties to newly discovered entrances. The previous owner's initials are etched on the chain clip, along with a date that matches one of the newer memorial stones down the road.
thing_1772644493224_dbcc77c8b0e2.shortDescription: A cracked brass monocle that enhances perception despite its damage.

metadata.properties: Grants advantage on checks to spot hidden details or read distant text. The crack sometimes catches light in distracting ways.

thing_1772644493224_d71a0de158a9.name: Casualty Tally Board
thing_1772644493224_d71a0de158a9.description: A massive wooden board mounted on thick timber posts, its surface covered in layers of painted statistics that never quite dry before the next rain washes them into streaking ribbons of color. The current week's death toll competes with faded older numbers beneath, creating a palimpsest of misery that grows denser toward the bottom.
thing_1772644493224_d71a0de158a9.shortDescription: A rain-streaked board displaying casualty statistics and Guild notices.

metadata.properties: Displays weekly casualty statistics, Guild notices, and reward postings. Notices can be torn down or added.

thing_1772644493224_975c4499354b.name: Mourner's Stake of Dusthollow
thing_1772644493224_975c4499354b.description: A simple wooden stake driven into the rocky ground, from which dangles a collection of tarnished tags, faded ribbons, and scraps of cloth—mementos left by survivors for those who didn't return. The wood has silvered with age and exposure, and small offerings of coins and dried flowers have accumulated at its base.
thing_1772644493224_975c4499354b.shortDescription: A memorial stake hung with mementos for fallen adventurers.

metadata.properties: Visitors sometimes leave small offerings. Occasionally contains coins or trinkets that can be taken, though doing so is considered deeply unlucky.

thing_1772644493224_e9ccd8f0804d.name: Smuggler's Hollow Stone
thing_1772644493224_e9ccd8f0804d.description: One of several seemingly ordinary rocks along the path that contains a hidden compartment large enough for small items. The hollow interior shows signs of frequent use, with wax drippings and scratch marks from hurried hands. Those who know the signal can access goods moved past Guild oversight—for a price.
thing_1772644493224_e9ccd8f0804d.shortDescription: A false rock hiding a compartment used for illicit trade.

metadata.properties: Hidden cache used for smuggling goods past Guild inspection. Contents vary based on recent activity.

thing_1772644493224_c8b5f08e21b8.name: Guard's Wind-Sheltered Brazier
thing_1772644493224_c8b5f08e21b8.description: A heavy iron brazier mounted on a stone platform, partially shielded by a clever arrangement of slate tiles that keep the flame alive even when cold winds rush up from the sinkhole. The coals glow with a faintly unnatural orange hue—mixed with something alchemical to burn longer and smoke less, though breathing too deeply brings on a mild headache.
thing_1772644493224_c8b5f08e21b8.shortDescription: A shielded iron brazier burning long-lasting alchemical coals.

metadata.properties: Provides warmth and light in a small radius. The alchemical coals can be harvested carefully, though they're hazardous to handle directly.

thing_1772644515078_fc775d26598d.name: Guard's Ledger
thing_1772644515078_fc775d26598d.description: A leather-bound registry thick with water-warped pages, listing every soul who has passed through this checkpoint—and the grim notations beside names indicating "returned," "confirmed dead," or simply left blank. The senior guard updates it with the mechanical efficiency of someone who stopped feeling each death long ago. Type: tool | Rarity: Common | Value: 5 | Weight: 2

thing_1772644515079_60f680663d25.name: Battered Guild Armband
thing_1772644515079_60f680663d25.description: A faded crimson brassard bearing the embroidered crest of the Adventurer's Guild, its edges frayed and the fabric stiff from repeated exposure to the dungeon's damp exhalations. Worn over chainmail, it marks the bearer as an official representative of the Guild's authority—at least in theory. Type: clothing | Slot: shoulders | Rarity: Common | Value: 15 | Weight: 0.5 | Bonuses: charisma +1

thing_1772644515079_a8142fdc9f6f.name: Dented Signal Horn
thing_1772644515079_a8142fdc9f6f.description: A tarnished brass horn hanging from a frayed cord, its surface dinged from years of hard use and its mouthpiece worn smooth. When blown, it produces a discordant note that echoes strangely against the dungeon's entrance—supposedly alerting the garrison at Dusthollow, though no one can recall it actually being used in earnest. Type: tool | Rarity: Common | Value: 8 | Weight: 1
thing_1772644515079_a8142fdc9f6f.shortDescription: Worn brass horn for signaling emergencies

thing_1772644515080_872ed8c20595.name: Checkpoint Lantern
thing_1772644515080_872ed8c20595.description: A hooded iron lantern burning with oil infused to produce a steady white flame, its glass cracked but functional. The light pushes back the creeping mist from the dungeon's maw, and the hook on its base allows it to hang from the warning post's timbers during long night watches. Type: tool | Slot: hands | Rarity: Common | Value: 12 | Weight: 3
thing_1772644515080_872ed8c20595.shortDescription: Hooded iron lantern with white flame

thing_1772644591398_4553893d5891.name: Guard's Spear
thing_1772644591398_4553893d5891.description: A sturdy iron-tipped spear with a ash haft worn smooth from years of handling. The weapon is practical rather than decorative, designed to keep trouble at bay rather than for heroic combat. Type: weapon | Slot: hands | Rarity: Common | Value: 15 | Weight: 6 | Bonuses: strength +1
thing_1772644591398_4553893d5891.shortDescription: Well-maintained iron-tipped spear with worn ash haft

thing_1772644591399_ae5731e7fda6.name: Wineskin of Watered Wine
thing_1772644591399_ae5731e7fda6.description: A leather wineskin containing cheap wine cut with water, the sort that keeps a man functional but takes the edge off long watches. The stopper is carved with a crude face laughing at some private joke. Type: consumable | Rarity: Junk | Value: 2 | Weight: 1
thing_1772644591399_ae5731e7fda6.shortDescription: Leather wineskin of cheap watered wine

thing_1772644591399_96f9fb476120.name: Cartel Signal Whistle
thing_1772644591399_96f9fb476120.description: A small silver whistle on a chain, seemingly innocent but bearing tiny etchings that identify the bearer to the Dusthollow Cartel's agents. Three short bursts signals a profitable opportunity; one long blast warns of Guild investigators nearby. Type: tool | Slot: accessory | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 25 | Weight: 0 | Bonuses: charisma +2
thing_1772644591399_96f9fb476120.shortDescription: Silver whistle with secret Cartel signal codes

thing_1772644591400_4b641b7e1fed.name: Bone Dice Set
thing_1772644591400_4b641b7e1fed.description: A set of six dice carved from animal bone, stained yellow with age and use. The dots are filled with blackened wax, and one die rolls suspiciously high more often than chance should allow. Type: tool | Rarity: Common | Value: 5 | Weight: 0
thing_1772644591400_4b641b7e1fed.shortDescription: Worn bone dice with one suspiciously lucky die

thing_1772644591400_67119c51a663.name: Holt's Ledger
thing_1772644591400_67119c51a663.description: A small leather-bound book ostensibly used for recording shift reports and passing travelers, but containing a coded list of names, dates, and payments received from Cartel informants. Written in a cipher only Brannick understands. Type: tool | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 50 | Weight: 1 | Bonuses: intelligence +2
thing_1772644591400_67119c51a663.shortDescription: Coded ledger tracking Cartel payments and informants

thing_1772644593929_9ea44b870b6d.name: Valdros Surveyor's Case
thing_1772644593929_9ea44b870b6d.description: A battered leather case reinforced with bronze corners, containing telescoping measuring rods, calibrated chains, and a precision astrolabe. The interior lining is stained with ink from a long-ago spill, and several compartments hold chalk sticks and charcoal for marking corridor walls. Type: tool | Slot: hands | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 85 | Weight: 6 | Properties: Grants advantage on checks to map passages, detect architectural anomalies, and track movement patterns within the labyrinth. The telescoping rods can measure distances up to 30 feet. | Bonuses: intelligence +2, wisdom +2
thing_1772644593929_9ea44b870b6d.shortDescription: Leather case with surveying instruments for dungeon mapping

metadata.properties: Grants advantage on checks to map passages, detect architectural anomalies, and track movement patterns within the labyrinth. The telescoping rods can measure distances up to 30 feet.

thing_1772644593929_da30e4d6580b.name: Copper-Wrapped Research Journal
thing_1772644593929_da30e4d6580b.description: A thick-bound journal wrapped in protective oilcloth, its covers reinforced with thin copper plates etched with lunar phase diagrams. Hundreds of pages are filled with cramped handwriting, architectural sketches, celestial calculations, and increasingly obsessive marginalia about the Sinking Stairs. Type: tool | Slot: hands | Rarity: Common | Value: 15 | Weight: 2 | Properties: Contains Sycorax's accumulated research on lunar-correlated passage shifts. A knowledgeable reader might glean useful navigation insights, though the disorganized notes require patience to interpret.
thing_1772644593929_da30e4d6580b.shortDescription: Scholar's journal with lunar phase research and corridor sketches

metadata.properties: Contains Sycorax's accumulated research on lunar-correlated passage shifts. A knowledgeable reader might glean useful navigation insights, though the disorganized notes require patience to interpret.

thing_1772644593930_3197c246bb72.name: Scholar's Traveling Robes
thing_1772644593930_3197c246bb72.description: Heavy wool robes dyed a deep midnight blue, patched at the elbows and hemmed short to avoid trailing on wet stone. Numerous inner pockets hold vials of ink, spare quills, and wrapped rations, while a cleverly concealed pocket near the heart can secure small valuables. Type: armor | Slot: body | Rarity: Common | Value: 28 | Weight: 4 | Properties: Provides minor protection against cold and damp. The many pockets allow easy access to writing implements and small tools without searching through a pack.
thing_1772644593930_3197c246bb72.shortDescription: Patched midnight blue robes with numerous inner pockets

metadata.properties: Provides minor protection against cold and damp. The many pockets allow easy access to writing implements and small tools without searching through a pack.

thing_1772644593930_e6c93c2705c8.name: Lunar-Phase Astrolabe
thing_1772644593930_e6c93c2705c8.description: A palm-sized brass astrolabe engraved with three overlapping dial faces representing the moon's phases, the dungeon's tidal magical fluctuations, and something called the "Deep Rhythm" in faded gilt lettering. A small crystal lens focuses ambient light onto the calibration marks. Type: accessory | Slot: accessory | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 120 | Weight: 1 | Properties: Once per day, can determine the current lunar phase and predict which stair configurations are most likely in the Sinking Stairs. The crystal lens can detect faint magical residues within 10 feet. | Bonuses: wisdom +3
thing_1772644593930_e6c93c2705c8.shortDescription: Brass astronomical instrument for tracking lunar phases and dungeon shifts

metadata.properties: Once per day, can determine the current lunar phase and predict which stair configurations are most likely in the Sinking Stairs. The crystal lens can detect faint magical residues within 10 feet.

thing_1772644943988_28559fdfd222.name: Slipstone Crampons
thing_1772644943988_28559fdfd222.description: Iron spikes strapped to heavy leather frames, designed to grip the unnaturally smooth patches of stone found throughout the Sinking Stairs. Veterans swear by them after watching too many novices slide into the mist.
thing_1772644943988_28559fdfd222.shortDescription: Iron climbing spikes for treacherous smooth stone surfaces

metadata.properties: Grants advantage on checks to maintain footing on smooth or slippery surfaces. Disadvantage on stealth checks due to clicking on stone.

thing_1772644943989_12fc25d4faa6.name: Coarse Hemp Rope Coil
thing_1772644943989_12fc25d4faa6.description: A sturdy fifty-foot length of rope favored by thrifty adventurers who haven't yet lost one to a pit trap, gelatinous cube, or desperate escape. Smells faintly of tar and fear.
thing_1772644943989_12fc25d4faa6.shortDescription: Sturdy fifty-foot rope for climbing and safety lines

metadata.properties: Can be uncoiled and secured to create a safety line or climbing aid. Breaks under extreme strain.

thing_1772644943989_ba55c5b5ff93.name: Shattered Wayfinder Lantern
thing_1772644943989_ba55c5b5ff93.description: A brass lantern cracked beyond repair, its glass shattered and oil reservoir long dried. Whoever carried this must have dropped it during a hasty retreat—or something took it from them.
thing_1772644943989_ba55c5b5ff93.shortDescription: Broken brass lantern dropped by some past adventurer

metadata.properties: Can be salvaged for small amounts of brass and glass shards.

thing_1772644943989_e4d45edc30ab.name: Worn Rest Niche
thing_1772644943989_e4d45edc30ab.description: A shallow alcove carved into the switchback wall, just deep enough to shelter one or two people from the rising cold air. Centuries of use have worn the stone smooth, and someone has scratched a crude blessing above the opening.
thing_1772644943989_e4d45edc30ab.shortDescription: Shallow carved alcove sheltering climbers from cold drafts

metadata.properties: Provides shelter from cold updrafts. Often used for brief rests before the final descent.

thing_1772644943989_ebf20a245bcb.name: Tether Ring and Iron Staple
thing_1772644943989_ebf20a245bcb.description: A rusted iron ring set deep into the rock face with a heavy staple, intended for securing ropes during descents. Weathered but still solid enough to trust—probably.
thing_1772644943989_ebf20a245bcb.shortDescription: Rusted iron ring bolted to rock for securing descent ropes

metadata.properties: Can be used to secure ropes for rappelling. Requires inspection before trusting with weight.

thing_1772644943990_bea8b4620625.name: Voice of the Sinking Stairs
thing_1772644943990_bea8b4620625.description: An unusual acoustic phenomenon where the sinkhole's geometry creates natural amplification. Whispers spoken near this worn patch of wall echo strangely, sometimes carrying fragments of conversations from climbers far below—or perhaps from somewhere else entirely.
thing_1772644943990_bea8b4620625.shortDescription: Natural acoustic phenomenon amplifying whispers and distant sounds

metadata.properties: Can amplify whispered messages to carry further into the dungeon. Sometimes reveals distant sounds or voices from unknown origin.

thing_1772644985175_069829bac709.name: Corroded Imperial Longsword
thing_1772644985175_069829bac709.description: A notched blade bearing the faint etching of a sunburst crest, its edge dulled by centuries yet still capable of cleaving flesh. The metal has darkened with age and something darker seems to cling to the steel, whispering faintly when drawn. Type: weapon | Slot: hands | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 45 | Weight: 3 | Status Effect: Target: Necrotic Chill - The wound frosts over and the flesh around it turns gray and numb, slowing movement and dulling reflexes. | Bonuses: strength +2, dexterity -2
thing_1772644985175_069829bac709.shortDescription: Notched ancient blade that numbs wounded flesh

causeStatusEffectOnTarget.name: Necrotic Chill
causeStatusEffectOnTarget.description: Frost spreads through wounded flesh, turning skin gray and numb. The creeping cold slows movements and makes fine motor control difficult.

causeStatusEffect.name: Necrotic Chill
causeStatusEffect.description: Frost spreads through wounded flesh, turning skin gray and numb. The creeping cold slows movements and makes fine motor control difficult.

causeStatusEffectOnTarget.name: Necrotic Chill
causeStatusEffectOnTarget.description: Frost spreads through wounded flesh, turning skin gray and numb. The creeping cold slows movements and makes fine motor control difficult.

thing_1772644985186_4697c97d7875.name: Flaking Chainmail Hauberk
thing_1772644985186_4697c97d7875.description: Rusted links that shed orange flakes with every movement, this armor once protected an imperial guardsman. Though corroded, the mail still turns aside weaker blows and carries lingering protective enchantments. Type: armor | Slot: body | Rarity: Common | Value: 30 | Weight: 25 | Bonuses: constitution +1, dexterity -1
thing_1772644985186_4697c97d7875.shortDescription: Rusted chainmail with fading protective magic

thing_1772644985186_fe6ec71bd5ab.name: Bone Guardian's Signet
thing_1772644985186_fe6ec71bd5ab.description: A tarnished bronze ring set with a cracked carnelian, inscribed with symbols of fealty to an empire long dust. It pulses faintly when danger approaches, the gemstone's fracture weeping a slow, reddish light. Type: accessory | Slot: ring | Rarity: Uncommon | Value: 65 | Weight: 0 | Status Effect: Equipper: Death's Sight - The wearer can sense the presence of undead creatures within sixty feet as a cold pressure against their mind. | Bonuses: wisdom +2
thing_1772644985186_fe6ec71bd5ab.shortDescription: Cracked bronze ring sensing nearby undead

causeStatusEffectOnEquipper.name: Death's Sight
causeStatusEffectOnEquipper.description: A supernatural awareness that manifests as an icy weight behind the eyes when undead draw near. The sensation grows stronger with proximity, allowing rough estimation of distance and direction.

causeStatusEffect.name: Death's Sight
causeStatusEffect.description: A supernatural awareness that manifests as an icy weight behind the eyes when undead draw near. The sensation grows stronger with proximity, allowing rough estimation of distance and direction.

causeStatusEffectOnEquipper.name: Death's Sight
causeStatusEffectOnEquipper.description: A supernatural awareness that manifests as an icy weight behind the eyes when undead draw near. The sensation grows stronger with proximity, allowing rough estimation of distance and direction.
